zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Knt. John d'Arderne I於1266年6月2日出生時，他的父親Sir Walkelin d'Arderne Chief Justice of Chester51歲，母親Agnes de Orreby46歲。他和Margaret Ferch Gruffydd至少有1個兒子。他去世於1308年6月1日在英國爾阿爾萬利享年41歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Knt. John d'Arderne I于1266年6月2日出生时，他的父亲Sir Walkelin d'Arderne Chief Justice of Chester51岁，母亲Agnes de Orreby46岁。他和Margaret Ferch Gruffydd至少有1个儿子。他去世于1308年6月1日在英国爾阿爾萬利享年41岁。

nameMeanings.name: d'Arderne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Patrice, Jacques.
French and Walloon: habitational name, with fused preposition d(e) ‘from’, for someone from the Ardennes, a forested plateau in northeastern France, Belgium (Wallonia), and Luxembourg.
French: habitational name, with fused preposition d(e) ‘from’, for someone from a place called Ardenne, for example in Charente-Maritime and Haute-Loire.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Knt. John d'Arderne I was born on 2 June 1266, his father, Sir Walkelin d'Arderne Chief Justice of Chester, was 51 and his mother, Agnes de Orreby, was 46. He had at least 1 son with Margaret Ferch Gruffydd. He died on 1 June 1308, in Alvanley, Cheshire, England, at the age of 41.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Knt. John d'Arderne I est né le 2 juin 1266, son père, Sir Walkelin d'Arderne Chief Justice of Chester, avait 51 ans et sa mère, Agnes de Orreby, avait 46 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Margaret Ferch Gruffydd. Il est décédé le 1 juin 1308, à Alvanley, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 41 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Knt. John d'Arderne I am 2. Juni 1266 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Walkelin d'Arderne Chief Justice of Chester 51 und seine Mutter Agnes de Orreby 46. Er hatte mit Margaret Ferch Gruffydd mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 1. Juni 1308 im Alter von 41 Jahren in Alvanley, Cheshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Knt. John d'Arderne I è nato il il 2 giugno 1266, il suo padre, Sir Walkelin d'Arderne Chief Justice of Chester, aveva 51 anni e il suo madre, Agnes de Orreby, aveva 46 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Margaret Ferch Gruffydd. Morì il 1 giugno 1308, nel Alvanley, Cheshire, England, all'età di 41 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Knt. John d'Arderne Iが1266年6月2日に生まれた時，父Sir Walkelin d'Arderne Chief Justice of Chesterは51歳，母Agnes de Orrebyは46歳であった。彼はMargaret Ferch Gruffyddとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1308年6月1日にイギリスチェシュアイアアルヴァンリーで41歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Knt. John d'Arderne I(이)가 1266년 6월 2일에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Walkelin d'Arderne Chief Justice of Chester(은)는 51세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes de Orreby(은)는 46세였다. 그는 Margaret Ferch Gruffydd(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1308년 6월 1일 영국 체실르 앨반리에서 41세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.02 JUN 1266–1 June 1308: 2 de junho de 1266–1 de junho de 1308
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Knt. John d'Arderne I nasceu em 2 de junho de 1266, seu pai, Sir Walkelin d'Arderne Chief Justice of Chester, tinha 51 anos e sua mãe, Agnes de Orreby, tinha 46 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Margaret Ferch Gruffydd. Ele faleceu em 1 de junho de 1308, em Alvanley, Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 41 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Knt. John d'Arderne I родился 2 июня 1266 г., его отцу по имени Sir Walkelin d'Arderne Chief Justice of Chester было 51 год, а матери, которую звали Agnes de Orreby, 46. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Margaret Ferch Gruffydd. Он умер 1 июня 1308 г. в местности алванли, чешир, Англия в возрасте 41 год.

es.02 JUN 1266–1 June 1308: 2 de junio de 1266–1 de junio de 1308
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Knt. John d'Arderne I nació el 2 de junio de 1266, su papá, Sir Walkelin d'Arderne Chief Justice of Chester, tenía 51 años y su mamá, Agnes de Orreby, tenía 46 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Margaret Ferch Gruffydd. Murió el 1 de junio de 1308, en Alvanley, Cheshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 41 años.
